svg.text: the root system · verb conjugation · nouns · core vocabulary · numbers
every Hebrew word grows from a 3-letter root · the root carries the core meaning · patterns change the function
same 3-letter skeleton · different vowels and prefixes/suffixes · different function
— · — VERB CONJUGATION · QAL STEM · PATTERN: קָטַל — · —
Qal = basic/simple action · most common verb stem · model: QaTaL = he killed/acted
verb always comes first in the sentence · vav-consecutive וְ flips perfect ↔ imperfect in narrative
two nouns joined: second owns first
bet + melekh = house of the king
definite article: הַ- ha- (the) · no indefinite article: מֶלֶך = a king / king
see Plate 09D for continuous text · Plate 09B for pronunciation · audio disc for spoken reading
